summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently, as requested. Two hydrated PRs (#93377 and #92782) are routed to central OpenClaw security handling because deterministic validation marked those exact targets security-sensitive. The remaining PRs stay non-mutating keep_related actions; no close, merge, or fix actions are planned because the job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise-pr paths.
